title: taraxacum marginellum
intro: Taraxacum marginellum, also known as the Alpine dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum marginellum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum marginellum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for easy integration into a healthy lifestyle.
